description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a cylindrical shape, featuring a bright red exterior and a black plastic lid. The cup has a white circular label on one side with the word 'Coffee' and a steaming cup graphic, suggesting it is intended for hot beverages. The lid appears to be a snap-on type, commonly used for takeaway drinks, and has a small opening for sipping. The base of the cup is slightly narrower than the top, typical of paper coffee cups for easy stacking and holding. The surface of the cup is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, while the lid has a matte finish. There are no visible handles or additional decorative patterns aside from the logo.
description: A red disposable coffee cup with a black plastic lid and a white 'Coffee' logo on one side. The cup is smooth, glossy, and designed for takeaway hot drinks.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its red body and black lid, with the white logo partially visible on the right edge.
description_view_1: The front view displays the white 'Coffee' logo and steaming cup graphic prominently on the red surface.
description_view_2: The cup is rotated so the red body is fully visible, with the logo just out of sight on the left edge.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the back, displaying only the plain red surface and black lid, with no logo visible.
